title: PSP PSX games
wikitext:
[]: PSP/PSX games             Quote Post by Mackerel » Sat Aug 05, 2023 10:04 am so im relatively new here and to evangelion fandom as a whole however i am curious on whether or not i can play the PSP and PSX games on a PSVita? i own both a PSP-3003 and a PSV-2k/slim but only my vita is homebrew activated so i was wondering if i could use it to play stuff like the gfos1 and 2 psp and psx translations through something like adrenaline? sorry if this is a stupid question

[]: Re: PSP/PSX games             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Sat Aug 05, 2023 6:07 pm Yes. PS Vita natively emulates PSP and PSX, which is why there were select titles available to buy and download digitally through official means. Adrenaline is just a means of using said built-in emulation to load any game from those systems you would want, including fan translations. Retroarch emulates anything else the Vita is capable of (from a hardware perspective) but not natively in its built-in software, such as SNES titles.

[]: Re: PSP/PSX games             Quote Post by Mackerel » Sun Aug 06, 2023 10:16 am ^ thanks man, helps a lot, i wasnt sure because of fan translations and stuff ill definitely give it a go
